context: Tests whether the agent correctly migrates legacy externals to per-program files under .chezmoiexternals/, updates script references, preserves conditionals, and includes chezmoi diff verification before deleting the legacy file.

checklist.name: Program-specific file names
checklist.description: Output files follow the PROGRAM.externals.toml[.tmpl] naming convention (zsh.externals, bat.externals, tmux.externals) — NOT a single combined file

checklist.name: Zsh conditionals preserved
checklist.description: zsh.externals.toml.tmpl retains the `{{ if lookPath "zsh" }}` conditional wrapping the zsh plugin entries

checklist.name: bat conditionals preserved
checklist.description: bat.externals.toml.tmpl retains the `{{ if lookPath "bat" }}` conditional

checklist.name: tmux no .tmpl suffix
checklist.description: The tmux externals file does NOT have a .tmpl suffix (since it has no template directives)

checklist.name: Run script reference updated
checklist.description: run_onchange_externals.sh.tmpl no longer references `.chezmoiexternal.toml.tmpl` — includes are updated to the new file paths or removed

checklist.name: chezmoi diff before delete
checklist.description: migration_plan.md explicitly states to run `chezmoi diff` BEFORE deleting or removing the original .chezmoiexternal.toml.tmpl file

checklist.name: Delete only after diff succeeds
checklist.description: migration_plan.md conditions removal of the legacy file on `chezmoi diff` showing no unexpected changes

checklist.name: Entries fully moved
checklist.description: All four external definitions from the input file appear in the output files (2 zsh, 1 bat, 1 tmux) — none are dropped

checklist.name: SHAs unchanged
checklist.description: All revision and URL commit SHAs in the output files match the input exactly — no SHAs are altered during migration

checklist.name: No apply during migration
checklist.description: migration_plan.md does NOT instruct running `chezmoi apply` before the diff verification step is complete
